title: Allahabad High Court directs UP to pay ₹2 lakh for vehicle seizure over unproven beef transport claim
description: The Allahabad High Court has directed the Uttar government to pay a compensation of ₹2 lakh to a man whose vehicle was arbitrarily seized in 2024 in a case under the Uttar Pradesh Prevention of Cow Slaughter Act [Mohd Chand v State of UP and 3 Others]The vehicle was confiscated on the allegation that it was being used for transporting beef of five cows in October 2024. Justice Sandeep Jain found that the veterinary doctor, who had examined the meat, was not confident whether it was beef and had
